description: Multi-pool committee proven live: two independent shielded markets (XLM, BTC) share one t-of-n committee. Pool A's full private lifecycle (batch net 30/20 -> resolve -> private redeem pays a winner) and pool B's independent batch (net 8/3) each settle ONLY their own orders to their OWN market with no cross-leak. Members attest for both pools via ATTEST_TARGETS.
